_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PTERODACTYL PANEL - PTERODACTYL.IO
name: FiveM Enhanced
author: tigerg134@tuta.io
description: A FiveM egg for Enhanced servers
startup: TERM=dumb $(pwd)/alpine/lib/ld-musl-x86_64.so.1 --library-path "$(pwd)/alpine/lib/:$(pwd)/alpine/usr/lib/" -- $(pwd)/alpine/opt/cfx-server/cfx-server +set citizen_dir $(pwd)/alpine/opt/cfx-server/citizen/ +set sv_licenseKey {{FIVEM_LICENSE}} +set steam_webApiKey {{STEAM_WEBAPIKEY}} +set sv_maxplayers {{MAX_PLAYERS}} +set serverProfile default +exec server.cfg

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
# FiveM Installation Script
#
# Server Files: /mnt/server
apt update -y
apt install -y tar xz-utils file jq

mkdir -p /mnt/server/resources

cd /mnt/server

echo "Updating CitizenFX resource files"
git clone https://github.com/citizenfx/cfx-server-data.git /tmp
cp -Rf /tmp/resources/* resources/


if [ -n "${DOWNLOAD_URL}" ]; then
  if curl --output /dev/null --silent --head --fail "${DOWNLOAD_URL}"; then
    echo "Link is valid. Setting download link to ${DOWNLOAD_URL}"
    DOWNLOAD_LINK="${DOWNLOAD_URL}"
  else
    echo "Link is invalid. Exiting."
    exit 2
  fi
fi

echo -e "Running curl -sSL ${DOWNLOAD_LINK} -o ${DOWNLOAD_LINK##*/}"

curl -sSL ${DOWNLOAD_LINK} -o ${DOWNLOAD_LINK##*/}

echo "Extracting FiveM artifacts"

FILETYPE=$(file -F ',' ${DOWNLOAD_LINK##*/} | cut -d',' -f2 | cut -d' ' -f2)
if [ "$FILETYPE" == "gzip" ]; then
  tar xzvf ${DOWNLOAD_LINK##*/}
elif [ "$FILETYPE" == "Zip" ]; then
  unzip ${DOWNLOAD_LINK##*/}
elif [ "$FILETYPE" == "XZ" ]; then
  tar xvf ${DOWNLOAD_LINK##*/}
else
  echo -e "Unknown filetype. Exiting"
  exit 2
fi

rm -rf ${DOWNLOAD_LINK##*/} run.sh

if [ -e server.cfg ]; then
  echo "Skipping downloading default server config file as one already exists"
else
  echo "Downloading default fivem config"
  curl https://raw.githubusercontent.com/parkervcp/eggs/master/game_eggs/gta/fivem/server.cfg >>server.cfg
fi

mkdir -p logs/

echo "Install complete"

variables.name: FiveM License Key
variables.description: Required to start the service. Get your keys at https://keymaster.fivem.net/

variables.name: Max Player Count
variables.description: Sets the FiveM max player count

variables.name: Server Hostname
variables.description: The name that shows up in the server browser

variables.name: Artifact Download Link
variables.description:
This is the link to download the FiveM artifacts from. This is only used in the install script.

The file you link to needs to be an cfx-server_linux_x64.tar.xz file.

You can get the link from this website: https://docs.fivem.net/docs/server-download/ and clicking "FiveM for GTA Enhanced" and "Linux" then copying the link from the download button.

Example:
https://downloads.cfx-services.net/prod/019f8a75-b0f4-7dfc-8ac6-4dce4292da4a/cfx-server_linux_x64.tar.xz

variables.name: Steam Web Api Key
variables.description: Use your Steam WebApiKey or set to 'none'. Get your key at https://steamcommunity.com/dev/apikey/
